arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca says ‘fantastic’ Chelsea signing is putting in the work behind the scenes
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has praised Jadon Sancho for his efforts on, and off, the pitch. Desperate for a new challenge after falling out with Erik Ten Hag, Sancho, 24, swapped Manchester United for Chelsea at the end of the summer transfer window. And starting his Stamford Bridge career in perfect style, the 24-year-old winger registered an […] The post Enzo Maresca says ‘fantastic’ Chelsea signing is putting in the work behind the scenes appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Chelsea face legal battle with cat-kick star’s agent
arts.sum: Alrubie has released a statement via a spokesperson: “Chelsea and Ms Granovskaia have a clear interest in preventing [Alrubie’s] claim from being heard in open court given current investigations into the club and its activities under its previous ownership.” Alrubie’s battle with the Blues, however, surrounds a claim relating to the club and former director Marina Granovskaia.

arts.ttl: Chelsea have dossier on 'ambitious' defender after following his whole career - journalist
arts.sum: They could make a move for him in 2025.

arts.ttl: Chelsea are already three games away from nightmare Cole Palmer scenario
arts.sum: Players in the Premier League face a one-match ban for picking up five yellow cards before the cut-off point of the halfway mark of the season. Palmer already has two yellow cards to his name in four matches - making it a caution every other game so far.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs West Ham United LIVE: Predicted line-ups and injury news as star player is ruled out
arts.sum: Follow all the action as it happens from London Stadium

arts.ttl: Chelsea Champions League winner comes out of retirement aged 39 after a stint with Djibouti club Arta Solar 7
arts.sum: He played for Chelsea between 2006 and 2012, and scored 60 goals for the west London club in 254 appearances, winning the Premier League, FA Cup, League Cup and the Champions League.

arts.ttl: 'We don’t need to talk too much': Chelsea star shares just how good his on-field relationship with teammate is
arts.sum: 'We don’t need to talk too much.'

arts.ttl: Trouble brewing at Chelsea as Enzo Maresca has already fallen into the Pochettino trap
arts.sum: If there’s one thing that defines Chelsea’s owners at present it’s their unbelievable lack of patience, and that will have been something that Enzo Maresca was acutely aware of when taking the position of first-team manager. Thomas Tuchel wasn’t really given the chance to impress under Clearlake Capital before he was replaced by Graham Potter. arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid star Conor Gallagher shares a special moment with Chelsea youth players just a month after his Blues departure
arts.sum: Gallagher was pictured all smiles alongside a number of youngsters from Chelsea's academy who stopped by to watch the midfielder having travelled to Spain for the Madrid Football Cup.

arts.ttl: 'Zero truth': £100k-a-week Chelsea player doesn't want to leave the club - Fabrizio Romano
arts.sum: He's been linked with an exit.
